---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-wrapper}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

![](images/profile.jpg){.hero-image}

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

# Hi, I'm Esha Esha

## Business Studies Student at Dublin City University

### Future Business Analyst | Strategic Thinker | Global Mindset

I am passionate about business analytics, strategy, consumer behaviour, and innovation. I combine academic learning with practical work experience across Ireland and India.

My goal is to build an international career where data, creativity, and leadership create real business impact.

[Download CV](cv/Esha_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[View Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg}
[Contact Me](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg}

<br><br>

::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-box}
### 2+
Countries Worked In
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### 10+
Key Skills
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### 3
University Societies
:::

::: {.stat-box}
### Analytics
Specialisation
:::

:::

:::

:::

:::

---

## Why Choose Me

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Data Driven

I enjoy transforming information into insights that support better decisions.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Creative Thinker

I combine business logic with innovation and presentation skills.
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
### Global Perspective

Experience across Ireland and India has built adaptability and confidence.
:::

:::
